phase: R6 — merchant invoice pay-link + QR + pay-ID; buyer local-currency view
existing_before_build: merchant register already built /?pay=<name>&amt=<usdc>&addr=<G...> that pre-filled the buyer Pay screen (merchant, prefillUsdc, merchantAddr). Extended it — did not rebuild.
paylink_module: lib/paylink.ts — buildPayLink/parsePayLink carry pay, amt(usdc), addr, fiat(local), cur, id(pay-ID); makePayId() -> COWRIE-XXXX; no server resolver
merchant: invoice generates a display Pay ID (COWRIE-ABFA), a QR (qrcode.react QRCodeSVG of the absolute link), and a copyable full link; awaiting header shows 'Awaiting payment · Pay ID …'
buyer: loading the link auto-fills a LOCKED invoice card: merchant name, 'Pay $25.00 USDC ≈ ₦42,500', rate 'anchor quote (SEP-38, mock)', Pay ID, receiving address. No amount input (buyer can't change it).
critical_match: amount + address ride in the link into the real spend. e2e: link amt=25/addr=<G>; buyer paid $25.00; merchant real USDC +25.00 AT the invoice address; register flipped. amount_address_match=true.
e2e: R6 PAY-LINK + QR + LOCAL CURRENCY ✓ — merchant $25 (NGN42,500) invoice -> pay-ID+QR+link; buyer loads -> auto-filled $25 + ≈NGN42,500 + pay-ID, locked; pays -> merchant real USDC +25 at invoice addr -> register flips; paid amount/addr match invoice exactly

display_fix.bug: Paid screen TO line (and activity/receipt) could show the raw pay-link URL instead of the merchant name — root cause: a full pay-link URL pasted into the manual Merchant field was stored verbatim as merchant.
display_fix.fix: lib/paylink.ts cleanMerchant(value): if a value carries a `pay` param (a URL/query), extract+decode it; else return trimmed. Applied at (1) doPay — bind merchantToField + store payment.merchant + Paid via the CLEAN name; (2) manual Merchant input — a pasted pay-link now auto-loads as an invoice (clean name + amount + addr), never stored raw; (3) display sites — Paid to-line, activity rows, receipt sheet + blob merchantName all cleaned (also fixes any already-stored URL).
display_fix.display_only: underlying spend already used the parsed amount+address; payment still correct.
display_fix.e2e: R6 MERCHANT-NAME DISPLAY FIX ✓ — paste full URL into merchant field -> invoice auto-loads as "Minos Akara" (no raw URL); pay -> Paid to-line "to Minos Akara · clean"; activity "Minos Akara"; merchant real USDC +15. cleanMerchant unit-tested (7 cases).

verify_relocation.rationale: Selective disclosure: buyer PAYS -> buyer GENERATES a receipt scoped to the merchant -> the MERCHANT (recipient) VERIFIES. Verifying is a recipient action; the buyer never verifies. Verify was a pre-R5 leftover in the buyer nav.
verify_relocation.removed_from_buyer: Verify nav entry (walletNav) + its goTab branch + the receipt-ready sheet's 'Open verify view' link. Buyer now has ZERO /verify links (e2e + screenshot: sidenav 'HomePay', verifyLinks=0).
verify_relocation.added_to_merchant: 'Verify receipt' link in the register header -> /verify (reuses the EXISTING verify view; logic untouched). /verify back-link changed to '<- register' -> /merchant.
verify_relocation.logic_untouched: On-chain receipt verification, recipient binding, and wrong-recipient rejection are unchanged — proven in the R1 receipt-verify e2e (verify as recipient = success showing amount+merchant; verify as a different identity = rejected).
verify_relocation.e2e_note: Nav relocation verified: buyer sidenav 'HomePay' with 0 verify links; register header 'Verify receipt' -> /verify; clicking it reaches the verify page (back link '<- register'). The full buyer-pay -> receipt -> merchant-verify browser loop was blocked by a transient testnet RPC outage on the spend step ('Paid' heading 280s timeout, twice) — unrelated to this UI/routing change.
